rankings.title: The Dark Side Of Getting Rich On Youtube w/ @Matt D'Avella
summary_bullets: YouTube success can trap creators in a hamster wheel.
Scaling a team often backfires, reducing joy and freedom.
Both speakers downsized to rediscover creative purpose.
Parenting reshapes priorities away from hustle culture.
Hiring slow and focusing on unique strengths is key.
rankings.display_title: The Dark Side Of Getting Rich On Youtube w/ @Matt D'Avella
